author: y4rr
content: Observation: DenseNet121 — torchvision schema is features.denseblock<i>.denselayer<j>.{norm1,conv1,norm2,conv2}.* with features.{conv0,norm0,transition<i>,norm5}.* prefixes; ferrotorch is stem/block<i>.layer<j>.{bn_conv,body_conv}/trans<i>/classifier. Adding BN alone is insufficient — need either full source rename to match torchvision schema OR a test-side state_remap (like ViT #1001). Will choose source-rename for honest parity with the architect's spirit.
